description: Product Description Struggling to find something unique or original to give to your father, mother, husband, wife, boyfriend or girlfriend? Print4U has got your back with these amazing printed bbq and kitchen aprons for gents and ladies. These high quality aprons are a made of a cotton mix measuring 23 inches in width and 33 inches top to bottom. With ties at the back and a wide neck loop, these aprons are knee length on the average height adult. There is a very useful double pocket on the front which is great for keeping cooking utensils to hand. Made from a high quality hard wearing fabric that is machine washable, these are perfect for using in the kitchen, or at the barbecue, where most men (or women) manage to make a mess. Print4u have a range of personalised options where you can add the name or your choice as well as some superb generic designs for birthdays, summer time or simply gifting to the man or woman you love. Apron Gift Ideas A unique gift for that someone special - whether they are male or female, father or Auntie - they will love these personalised, quality cotton aprons Printed using premium quality inks Vibrant colours and easy to read Reinforced and durable stitching No premature ripping and tearing No fading even after multiple washes Machine Washable Great for Men and Women Measures 23 inches in width and 33 inches top to bottom.
